metadata.description: Fork of addyosmani/agent-skills that layers 10 Batuta skills + 7 agents (5 base + agent-architect + kb-pipeline) + 3 hooks (SessionStart + delegation-guard + post-commit KB pipeline) on top. Inherits 20 upstream engineering skills.

plugins.name: batuta-agent-skills
plugins.description: Batuta fork of agent-skills. 20 upstream skills + 10 Batuta skills (batuta-project-hygiene, batuta-skill-authoring, batuta-agent-authoring, batuta-rule-authoring, research-first-dev, code-graph, batuta-kb-vault, kb-curate, kb-backfill, plus deprecated notion-kb-workflow). 7 agents with explicit model:. Auto KB pipeline per ADR-0012 (Obsidian-only, post-commit dispatch).
